title: July Dividend Kings: 5 Buys, 4 To Watch
text: "There is only one-criterion to be included among the Dividend Kings: a publicly-traded company must increase its total fiscal-year dividend-payout for a minimum of 50 consecutive-years."--Dogs of the Dow. The 50 Dividend Kings screened as of June 27, 2023, represented nine of eleven Morningstar Sectors. Broker targeted-top-ten net-gainers ranged 20.35%-40.04% topped-by ABM Industries, and Gorman-Rupp. By yield, MO tops-all. Top-ten Kingly July yields from NFG, BKH, ABBV, NWN, FRT, CDUAF, MMM, UVV, LEG, & MO averaged 5.4%.

title: Retire Rich With 'Dividend King' Royalty
text: As my readers know, I'm no market timer, I'm a value investor. Regardless of what Fed Chair Jerome Powell is telling us, I'm confident that the rate-hike cycle is going to end (sooner rather than later). When that happens (rates pause indefinitely), dividends should compress (go lower) and shares should move back to normal valuation levels.

title: Is it Wise to Retain Federal Realty (FRT) Stock for Now?
text: Federal Realty's (FRT) focus on retail and mixed-use assets, expansion efforts, and a solid balance sheet poise it well for growth despite rising e-commerce adoption and high interest rate woes.

title: 3 Sweet REIT Blue-Chip Bargains

title: 4 Dividend Aristocrat Buys For June And 5 To Watch
text: "Dividend Aristocrats in the S&P 500 Index have raised their annual payouts every year for at least 25 consecutive years. "--Kiplinger.com/Investing. 67 Aristocrats, screened as of June 6, 2023, represented all eleven Morningstar Sectors. Broker estimated-top-ten net-gains ranged 20.58%-43.58% topped-by TGT & VFC. By yield, VFC topped-all Aristocrats. Top-ten Yields from TROW, ABBV, FRT, BEN, AMCR, IBM, O, WBA, MMM, & VFC, averaged 5.15%.

title: Federal Realty: The Yield Could Go Higher
text: Federal Realty's dividend yield has reached its highest level in two years at 4.6% due to a 15.6% decline in the common shares. The retail-focused REIT's dividend compound annual growth rate is now underperforming its peer group median, resulting in total returns of 3.1% over the last 3 years. Despite facing higher interest expenses, Federal Realty expects low single-digit FFO growth in 2023.

title: My 12 Best Dividend Kings For June 2023
text: The Dividend Kings are an elite group of companies that have paid and increased dividends for at least 50 consecutive years. The strategy focuses on selecting the top quarter of Dividend Kings with the best-forecasted EPS growth rate combined with the current valuation. A buy-and-hold approach is recommended for this strategy, as it is easier and more tax-friendly.

title: 3 Top REIT Stocks to Buy in June
text: American Tower, Federal Realty Trust, and Realty Income are venerable real estate investment trusts. They each have solid long-term records and good prospects within their respective markets.

title: 10 Dividend Aristocrats For The Ultimate 6% Yielding Retirement Portfolio
text: The NY Fed estimates a 68% recession probability within the next 12 months, the highest risk in 42 years. Dividend aristocrats can provide a relatively safe investment option during a recession, with a history of raising dividends through economic downturns and much lower volatility. A diversified high-yield portfolio of dividend aristocrats can offer market-like returns with lower volatility and higher yield.
